title: trifolium wormskioldii
intro: Trifolium wormskioldii, also known as Wormskioold's Clover, is a perennial herbaceous plant species belonging to the Fabaceae family, native to the mountainous regions of Europe and Asia. It has been used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments due to its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Trifolium wormskioldii include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate digestive issues, and support immune function. In herbal preparations, the plant is often dried and used in teas, infusions, or tinctures to harness its medicinal properties.
